welcome.heading: Welcome to LangHire!
welcome.description: Let's get you set up in just a few minutes. This wizard will walk you through the essential configuration.

items.configureAiDesc: The brain that fills out forms
items.uploadResumeDesc: AI reads it and auto-fills your profile
items.loginLinkedInDesc: Where we find and apply to jobs

llmStep.heading: Configure Your AI Provider
llmStep.description: Set up the AI model that powers everything — resume parsing, form filling, and job applications.

resumeStep.heading: Resume & Auto-Fill Profile
resumeStep.description: Set your resume path, then let AI read it and auto-fill your candidate profile.

autoFill.title: AI Auto-Fill Profile
autoFill.description: Extract name, email, phone, skills, education, experience, languages, and suggested job titles from your resume.
autoFill.nextHint: Click "Next" to review your auto-filled profile.

resumeStep.prerequisite: Save your AI provider (Step 1) and resume path above first.

profileStep.heading: Review Your Profile
profileStep.descriptionParsed: Your profile was auto-filled from your resume! Open the Profile page to review and fine-tune.
profileStep.descriptionManual: Fill in your candidate information on the Profile page. The agent uses this for applications.
profileStep.profileNeeded: Profile needs your name at minimum
profileStep.keyFields: Key fields: Name, Email, Phone, Skills, Target Job Titles, Target Locations, Education.
profileStep.autoFilledHint: Check Target Job Titles and Target Locations — these drive the job collection search.

readyStep.heading: You're All Set!
readyStep.descriptionDone: Everything is configured. Start collecting and applying!
readyStep.descriptionIncomplete: You can finish setup later. Check the Guide page anytime.
